case_title: SHAWN HALL VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
REMARK: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HALL, SHAWN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-150 REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL AS TO PLAINTIFF HALL, SHAWN
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE / ZOOM (HEARING SET FOR JUNE 2, 2021 AT 8:30AM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, SHAWN
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, SHAWN
EXHIBITS FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: JUN-02-2021 AT 08:30AM} AS TO PLAINTIFF HALL, SHAWN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SHAWN HALL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. VICTORIA LARSON, COUNSEL WITH LAWYERS COMMITTEE FOR CIVIL RIGHT OF SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA IS PRESENT FOR THE SOLE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING PLAINTIFF ACCESS TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FROM HER OFFICE ONLY. COUNSEL STATES THAT SHE IS NOT PROVIDING PLAINTIFF WITH ANY LEGAL ASSISTANCE IN THIS MATTER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, SHAWN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR JUNE 2, 2021 @ 08:30AM)
